- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.

logs.name: savage-causeway
logs.text:
>"subjective" is a better word than "debatable" IMO because it's more a matter of opinion regarding interpretation, than a matter of opinion regarding fact.

Interpretations are accountable to facts. Is it a fact that misogyny is a word with a reasonably clear and easily accessible definition? Is it also a fact that most (if not all) of the MRA subs have a high number of regular contributors who frequently promote attitudes and claims that very clearly fit the bill? These may not be easy questions to answer, but it doesn't follow that definitive answers don't exist even in principle.

Opinions aren't automatically respectable just because they are opinions. They can be weak, unjustified, misguided, or totally out of key with reality. They can even be flat out wrong. When I suggest that a claim isn't "debatable," I mean that there is no sensible, persuasive argument to be made against it based on the facts commonly available to us. So no, "subjective" is not a better word in this case.

logs.name: devout-metaball
logs.text:
You, in your post and other comments, define MRA subs as espousing outright hatred of women. And you said in another comment that you disagree with them -- even the ones you don't consider bastards -- on almost everything. So he's actually got quite a reason to suspect that he's not gonna change your view because you have very broad and rigid definitions of misogyny and outright hatred etc..

More importantly; you didn't even address the part of his comment where he explains how Reddit *is* doing something about it. Reddit is not allowing these subs to do as they wish; they follow and enforce strict rules such as not allowing doxxing and threatening that subreddit if their rhetoric goes to far.

logs.name: oriented-calico
logs.text:
@oriented-calico Oh wow, you really think you’re the dictionary authority now? Next you’ll tell us “nuance” is just a made-up word. Maybe you should look up “subjective” in a real book instead of making up new rules for what words mean. And hey, maybe not every MRA sub is a hate group, but calling everyone who disagrees with you a “bastard” is pretty low even for you. 😂

@devout-metaball So you’re saying I’m the one being rigid? Please, I’m just pointing out when people use words like “misogyny” like it’s a magic wand that fixes everything. And Reddit’s rules are fine, but you’re still acting like any subreddit is a free pass to say whatever you want. Newsflash: not every comment section is a court of law.

logs.name: aquamarine-patio
logs.text: @devout-metaball I get where you're coming from, but calling everything MRA is just a blanket statement. Not every sub is the same, and some folks are just having normal debates. You can’t just assume the worst because a few bad actors exist. And yeah, calling people names doesn’t make your argument stronger.

logs.name: cold-sequence
logs.text: @oriented-calico Wow, I didn’t realize you thought calling out hate speech was “making up new rules.” Guess I’m the one being sensitive now. Maybe you should actually read the sub rules before jumping on the bandwagon.

logs.name: savage-causeway
logs.text: @oriented-calico Oh, so being the self-appointed grammar police is your new hobby? I guess that makes you the expert then. Maybe next time you can explain why “misogyny” isn’t just a fancy word you can slap on anyone who disagrees with you. And don’t act so shocked when people call you out for your “enlightenment.” @devout-metaball You sound like you need a thesaurus and a mirror. @cold-sequence Maybe if you weren’t so quick to judge others, you’d realize not everyone wants to play your language police game.

logs.name: resultant-bin
logs.text: @oriented-calico I'm not the one policing language, but calling out hate is basic. If you can't distinguish between real bigotry and a disagreement, maybe that's the problem.

logs.name: intense-tilapia
logs.text: @oriented-calico Oh wow, did you just flip your moral switch when nobody was watching? You’re like the kid who only cares about rules when they catch you breaking them. Maybe next time, don’t get all high-and-mighty just because you can say the word “misogyny” the loudest. @savage-causeway You sound like you need a thesaurus too, but at least you’re consistent. @devout-metaball I bet you think calling people out is a superpower, but it’s just a loud mouth with a keyboard. @resultant-bin Please tell me you’re not the same person as @oriented-calico but just forgot their password.

logs.name: devout-metaball
logs.text: @oriented-calico Wow, you really think calling out words is the same as calling out behavior? Maybe you should actually read what you’re criticizing before you throw the label around. @savage-causeway You’re just as quick to judge as anyone else, you know. @cold-sequence If you want to talk about real issues, start by listening first.

logs.name: oriented-calico
logs.text: @oriented-calico Oh, so now you’re the expert on morality because you caught me saying a word? Please, I’ve called out plenty of people for being bigger jerks than you’ll ever be. Maybe you should take a seat and let the adults have this one. @savage-causeway I love how you’re the judge, jury, and executioner—next you’ll tell me to spell “empathy.” @devout-metaball If I wanted a thesaurus, I’d just ask you. But I’m too busy fixing your fragile little ego. @resultant-bin You’re just mad because you can’t win an argument without name-calling. Get a life.

logs.name: aquamarine-patio
logs.text: @oriented-calico Wow, you sound like you’re still stuck in that "I’m right just because I said it first" phase. Maybe try actually listening for once instead of just throwing darts from a distance.

logs.name: cold-sequence
logs.text: @oriented-calico Wow, you sound like you’re still playing the victim. If you can’t handle being called out, maybe you should just shut up and let the rest of us have a chance to talk. @savage-causeway You’re just as bad as the people you’re criticizing. @devout-metaball I’m done dancing for your approval. You want real conversation? Start by shutting up when you’re wrong.

logs.name: savage-causeway
logs.text: @oriented-calico Oh, so you’re the moral police now? Did you get a badge or just a big mouth? Maybe stick to the comment section where you belong.
